name: Geometry 5th
description: The coordinate plane and classifying two-dimensional figures in a hierarchy
objectives: Use ordered pairs to name and locate points in the first quadrant
Understand that the coordinates tell distances from the axes
Solve real-world problems using points on a coordinate grid
Classify two-dimensional figures by their properties
Understand that properties of a category apply to all its subcategories

ai.guidelines: Focus on the first quadrant of the coordinate plane: naming points with ordered pairs (x, y), understanding that the first coordinate is the distance along the x-axis and the second along the y-axis, finding horizontal or vertical distances between points that share a coordinate, and classifying two-dimensional figures in a hierarchy (every square is a rectangle and a rhombus, every rectangle is a parallelogram, a trapezoid has exactly one pair of parallel sides). Keep coordinates whole numbers from 0 to 12.
